From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Canada](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Canada "wiktionary:Canada")***, ***[canada](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/canada "wiktionary:canada")***, ***[Canadá](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Canad%C3%A1 "wiktionary:Canadá")***, ***[Canadà](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Canad%C3%A0 "wiktionary:Canadà")***, ***[cañada](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/ca%C3%B1ada "wiktionary:cañada")***, or ***[Ca-na-đa](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Ca-na-%C4%91a "wiktionary:Ca-na-đa")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada")** is a country in North America.

**Canada** may also refer to:

## Arts and entertainment

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Arts and entertainment")]

### Music

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Music")]

* [Canada (band)](/wiki/Canada_(band) "Canada (band)"), an American indie folk-pop music group
* *Canada*, a 1992 album by [Barb Jungr](/wiki/Barb_Jungr "Barb Jungr") and Michael Parker
* ["Canada" (song)](/wiki/Canada_(song) "Canada (song)") or "Ca-na-da", a 1967 song to celebrate Canada's centennial
* "Canada", a 2002 song by [Low](/wiki/Low_(band) "Low (band)")
* "Canada", a 1976 song by [Pilot](/wiki/Pilot_(Scottish_band) "Pilot (Scottish band)")
* "Canada", a song by Violent Soho from the 2020 album *[Everything Is A-OK](/wiki/Everything_Is_A-OK "Everything Is A-OK")*
* "Canada", a song by Lauv and Alessia Cara from the 2020 album *[How I'm Feeling](/wiki/How_I%27m_Feeling "How I'm Feeling")*
* "Canada", a song by Wallows from the 2024 album *[Model](/wiki/Model_(album) "Model (album)")*
* "C-A-N-A-D-A", a song by Raffi from the 1994 album *[Bananaphone](/wiki/Bananaphone "Bananaphone")*

### Other uses in arts and entertainment

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Other uses in arts and entertainment")]

* [*Canada* (novel)](/wiki/Canada_(novel) "Canada (novel)"), by Richard Ford, 2012
* Canada, [a *Hetalia: Axis Powers* character](/wiki/List_of_Hetalia:_Axis_Powers_characters#Canada "List of Hetalia: Axis Powers characters")

## Businesses and organisations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Businesses and organisations")]

* [Canada (company)](/wiki/Canada_(company) "Canada (company)"), a Spanish creative production company
* [Canada Company](/wiki/Canada_Company "Canada Company"), a former British land development company
* [Company of One Hundred Associates](/wiki/Company_of_One_Hundred_Associates "Company of One Hundred Associates"), or *Compagnie du Canada*, a former French trading and colonization company

## People

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: People")]

* [Canada (surname)](/wiki/Canada_(surname) "Canada (surname)"), including a list of people with the name
* [Canada Lee](/wiki/Canada_Lee "Canada Lee") (1907–1952), American boxer and actor
* [Canadá (footballer)](/wiki/Canad%C3%A1_(footballer) "Canadá (footballer)") (born 2004), Tiago Coimbra, Canadian soccer player

## Places

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Places")]

### Canada (historical)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Canada (historical)")]

* [Canada (New France)](/wiki/Canada_(New_France) "Canada (New France)"), a French colony
* [The Canadas](/wiki/The_Canadas "The Canadas"), the collective name for the British colonies of Lower Canada and Upper Canada
* [Province of Canada](/wiki/Province_of_Canada "Province of Canada"), a British colony
* [Republic of Canada](/wiki/Republic_of_Canada "Republic of Canada"), a short-lived rebellious entity

### United States

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: United States")]

* [Canada, Kansas](/wiki/Canada,_Kansas "Canada, Kansas"), United States
* [Canada, Kentucky](/wiki/Canada,_Kentucky "Canada, Kentucky"), United States

### United Kingdom

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: United Kingdom")]

* Canada, [Wellow, Hampshire](/wiki/Wellow,_Hampshire "Wellow, Hampshire"), England

### Elsewhere

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Elsewhere")]

* [Canada Glacier](/wiki/Canada_Glacier "Canada Glacier"), Antarctica

## Transportation

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Transportation")]

* [*Canada* (ship)](/wiki/Canada_(ship) "Canada (ship)"), the name of several ships
* 5553 *Canada*, a British [LMS Jubilee Class](/wiki/LMS_Jubilee_Class "LMS Jubilee Class") locomotive
* *Canada*, a British [LB&SCR B4 class](/wiki/LB%26SCR_B4_class "LB&SCR B4 class") locomotive
* [LNER Class A4 4489 *Dominion of Canada*](/wiki/LNER_Class_A4_4489_Dominion_of_Canada "LNER Class A4 4489 Dominion of Canada"), a British locomotive

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Canada_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [Canada (unit)](/wiki/Canada_(unit) "Canada (unit)"), an ancient Portuguese unit of liquid volume
